recommendation.reason: The best result was a 1% model / 99% market blend that matched market ROI but worsened log loss and Brier. Denser blend weights would only search closer to pure market unless the harness adds new feature, model, calibration, or hyperparameter axes.
recommendation.next_step: Do not keep adding blend weights. Improve the harness to cache base walk-forward predictions and support real experiment axes such as feature subsets, hyperparameters, calibration, and new pre-fight signals.

verification: rg expanded-sweep evidence in JSON/Markdown artifacts

smoke_gate.reason: This epic added CLI/config/artifact work only; it did not add an HTTP endpoint or UI surface.
